headline: Will P&G's Modest Earnings Uptick and Dividend Hike Change Procter & Gamble's (PG) Narrative?
summary: Earlier in April 2026, Procter & Gamble reported third‑quarter sales of US$21,235 million and net income of US$3,932 million, modestly higher than a year ago, while confirming its full‑year outlook and announcing a 3% quarterly dividend increase. Alongside these results, P&G highlighted its innovation pipeline and brand activity, from new Febreze TRASH Odor Fighter and Aussie Dry Shampoo launches to fresh retail and sports partnerships, underscoring how product development and marketing...

headline: lululemon Announces Appointment of Esi Eggleston Bracey to Board of Directors
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 28, 2026--lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) today announced the appointment of Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Chief Growth & Marketing Officer of Unilever PLC, to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. With Ms. Bracey joining the Board, the company will have appointed six new independent directors in the last five years as part of the Board’s commitment to continued refreshment.

content.title: lululemon Announces Appointment of Esi Eggleston Bracey to Board of Directors
content.summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 28, 2026--lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) today announced the appointment of Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Chief Growth & Marketing Officer of Unilever PLC, to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. With Ms. Bracey joining the Board, the company will have appointed six new independent directors in the last five years as part of the Board’s commitment to continued refreshment.
